question: What shape does your Sunday want to take today?
dek: No wrong answer. Pick the one your body is actually asking for, not the one you said you'd do.

options.label: Morning walk · long coffee · nowhere
options.hint: out the door before the day has opinions

options.label: Kitchen project · something that takes hours
options.hint: sauce that needs watching · dough that needs rest · radio on

options.label: Out early · back late
options.hint: a drive somewhere · a meal out · no counting minutes

options.label: Phone away · book only
options.hint: airplane mode · chair · the same paragraph three times

options.label: Couch · whatever plays · no shame
options.hint: the Sunday that admits it's Sunday

outcomeAction: Leading shape seeds the next Sunday-dispatch block — cc writes the day Mike's readers actually wanted.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — zeitgeist cluster: Sunday-shapes · multiple start points into the existing Sunday poll family
